summary: Iteration 53: Framer Motion Animations Testing Complete. All 13 features tested and verified. Page transitions, scroll-triggered animations, dropdown animations, and modal animations all working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Framer Motion v12.38.0 animations fully verified. All animation components (FadeUp, StaggerContainer, StaggerItem, ScaleIn, dropdownVariants, modalVariants) working correctly.

hero_section_animations.details: Hero section loads with animated text, search, CTAs. All motion.div elements animate correctly with initial/animate transitions.

hero_stats_cards.details: Stats cards (810+, 13, 33, 24/7) render with stagger animation. Each card has correct data-testid and displays expected values.

clinical_categories_scroll_animation.details: Clinical Categories section loads with FadeUp heading and StaggerContainer/StaggerItem for division cards. 13 division cards found.

featured_products_scroll_animation.details: Featured Products section loads with scroll-triggered animations. 8 featured product cards found with proper stagger effect.

cta_section.details: CTA section displays 'Equip Your Hospital with Precision Meril Products' with ScaleIn animation. All 3 CTA buttons visible.

whatsapp_dropdown_animation.details: WhatsApp header dropdown animates open/close smoothly using dropdownVariants. All 3 options (Sales, Catalog, Support) visible.

lead_capture_modal_from_hero.details: Clicking 'Check Availability & Pricing' opens animated LeadCaptureModal with modalOverlayVariants and modalContentVariants.

lead_capture_modal_animation.details: LeadCaptureModal has smooth entrance animation (scale 0.95->1, opacity 0->1, y 20->0). All form fields present.

page_transitions.details: Page transitions work correctly with AnimatePresence mode='wait'. Tested Home -> Catalog -> Contact -> Home navigation.

catalog_division_page.details: Trauma division page loads 132 products with proper filtering. Product cards display correctly.

product_detail_page.details: Product detail page opens correctly. WhatsApp Enquiry button opens WhatsApp directly (by design, not LeadCaptureModal).

footer_four_columns.details: Footer has 4 columns: Brand (Agile Ortho with tagline), Navigation, Locations, Compliance.

mobile_sticky_action_bar.details: Mobile sticky action bar present at bottom with Call, WhatsApp, Browse buttons. WhatsApp opens LeadCaptureModal.

animation_components_verified.PageTransition: Used in Layout.jsx with AnimatePresence for page transitions
animation_components_verified.FadeUp: Used for scroll-triggered fade up animations on headings
animation_components_verified.StaggerContainer: Used for staggered children animations on card grids
animation_components_verified.StaggerItem: Used for individual items in stagger animations
animation_components_verified.ScaleIn: Used for scale-in effect on CTA section
animation_components_verified.dropdownVariants: Used for WhatsApp dropdown animation in SiteHeader

notes: Product detail page WhatsApp Enquiry button opens WhatsApp directly (not LeadCaptureModal) - this is by design as it pre-fills the product name in the WhatsApp message.
